meta.description: Same IFA geometry as the baseline, but the substrate is FR4 (eps_r = 4.4) instead of the low-loss 2.2 laminate. Use this to analyze dielectric loading: the higher permittivity slows the guided wave, so both resonances shift DOWN in frequency relative to the baseline and the bands narrow. Far-field probe frequencies are lowered to 2.0/5.0 GHz to stay near the shifted resonances. 4000 steps.
